product_overview: A static marketing website with interactive lead-generation tools (contact widget, quote calculator, scheduling) and informational pages (blog, case studies, services). Client-side JS drives forms, animations, cookie consent and third-party integrations (n8n webhooks, Stripe, Google Calendar, WhatsApp).
core_goals: Capture qualified leads via contact widget and interactive quote calculator posting to n8n webhooks.
Provide a smooth informational experience with searchable blog, case studies filter, and service detail pages.
Offer immediate conversion CTAs (Stripe checkout, Google Calendar scheduling, WhatsApp) that open external flows.
Comply with cookie consent preferences and persist user theme and cookie settings client-side.
Deliver accessible, responsive UI with reveal animations and social proof counters to increase trust.

features.name: Simple Contact Form (Hablemos)
features.description: Three-field contact form in the contact widget used to send basic lead messages to the n8n webhook.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html#contacto -> Click "Hablemos" tab (active by default) -> Fill name field (required) -> Fill company field (optional) -> Select contact method radio (Email) -> Fill email field (required) -> Fill message textarea (required) -> Click "Enviar Mensaje" submit button -> See success popup after successful submission

Navigate to /index.html#contacto -> Click "Hablemos" tab -> Leave required fields blank or enter invalid email -> Click "Enviar Mensaje" submit button -> See inline validation errors and prevent submission -> See no success popup

features.name: Service Request Form (Ticket)
features.description: Service ticket creation form in the contact widget's second tab that supports file attachments and posts FormData to n8n.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html#servicio -> Click "Solicitud de Servicio" tab -> Fill requester name (required) -> Select contact method and fill email or phone+country -> Fill task title (required) -> Fill task description (required) -> Pick desired start date (required) -> Optionally attach file (image or PDF < 50MB) -> Click "Crear Solicitud" submit button -> See success popup after submission

Navigate to /index.html#servicio -> Click "Solicitud de Servicio" tab -> Attach unsupported file type or attach file > 50MB -> Click "Crear Solicitud" submit button -> See file validation error and prevent submission

features.name: Appointment Scheduling Tabs
features.description: Third tab in the contact widget that links to Google Calendar booking pages for three meeting types.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html#agendar -> Click "Agendar" tab -> Click appointment type card "Asesoría Comercial" -> Browser opens Google Calendar scheduling link in new tab
Navigate to /index.html#agendar -> Click "Agendar" tab -> Click appointment type card -> Browser blocks pop-up or new tab is prevented -> See blocked/failed redirect notification or nothing happens

features.name: Interactive Quote Calculator
features.description: 3-step JS wizard on /cotizador.html to select categories, pick services/extras with live price summary, and submit a lead to n8n.
user_flows: Navigate to /cotizador.html -> Select one or more service categories on Step 1 -> Click "Continuar" to advance to Step 2 -> Toggle service cards on by clicking them -> Toggle optional extras checkboxes per service -> Increment/decrement counter extras -> View real-time price summary sidebar update (one-time + monthly + savings) -> Click "Solicitar Cotización" to advance to Step 3 -> Fill name (required), company, email (required), phone (required), comments -> Click "Enviar Cotización" submit button -> See success confirmation after POST to webhook

Navigate to /cotizador.html -> Select categories on Step 1 -> Click "Continuar" -> Click "Solicitar Cotización" to advance to Step 3 -> Leave required contact fields empty -> Click "Enviar Cotización" -> See validation errors and prevent POST -> See no success confirmation

features.name: Diagnostic Quiz (inside Calculator)
features.description: 3-question guided quiz launched from Step 1 of the calculator that auto-selects recommended service categories.
user_flows: Navigate to /cotizador.html -> Click "No sé por dónde empezar" button -> Answer question 1 -> Answer question 2 -> Answer question 3 -> See quiz auto-select recommended categories and return to Step 1 with selections applied

Navigate to /cotizador.html -> Click "No sé por dónde empezar" button -> Start quiz and then close or navigate away before finishing -> Return to Step 1 with no auto-selected categories and no changes applied

features.name: Case Studies Filter
features.description: Client-side filter on /casos.html that shows/hides case cards by data-category attributes.
user_flows: Navigate to /casos.html -> Click filter button "Todos" -> See all case cards visible
Navigate to /casos.html -> Click filter button "Chatbots" -> See only cards with data-category="chatbots" displayed -> If no cards match show a "no results" state

features.name: Cookie Consent Banner (GDPR)
features.description: Cookie consent banner and preferences panel with Accept All / Reject Optional / Configure actions; preferences stored in localStorage under cd_cookie_consent.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Wait 900ms for banner auto-show -> Click "Aceptar Todo" -> See banner dismiss -> Observe cd_cookie_consent saved in localStorage with all consents enabled

Navigate to /index.html -> Wait 900ms for banner auto-show -> Click "Configurar" -> Toggle analytics and marketing checkboxes -> Click "Guardar Preferencias" -> See banner dismiss and preferences saved in localStorage -> Reload page and preferences persist

Navigate to /index.html -> Simulate localStorage disabled -> Click "Configurar" -> Toggle checkboxes -> Click "Guardar Preferencias" -> See an error or preferences not persisted and banner reappears on reload

features.name: Dark/Light/Auto Theme Toggle
features.description: Header theme switcher that cycles auto/dark/light, updates logo variant, and persists choice in localStorage under cd-theme.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Click sun/moon toggle button in header -> Theme cycles from auto to dark to light -> Observe logo swap to matching variant -> Reload page -> Observe selected theme persisted
Navigate to /index.html -> Disable localStorage or permissions -> Click theme toggle -> Observe UI changes occur but preference is not persisted on reload

features.name: IT Partner Plan Purchase (Stripe)
features.description: Service detail page with two Stripe checkout links (Standard $50/mo, Evolution $300/mo) that open external Stripe checkout pages.
user_flows: Navigate to /servicios/it-partner.html -> View plan comparison table -> Click "Activar Estándar" button -> Browser opens Stripe checkout (https://buy.stripe.com) in new tab
Navigate to /servicios/it-partner.html -> Click plan CTA -> External redirect blocked or Stripe link expired -> See browser block or Stripe error page

features.name: Scroll Reveal Animations
features.description: IntersectionObserver-based reveal animations for elements with .reveal, .reveal-left, .reveal-right, .reveal-scale classes that add 'active' on intersection and support data-delay.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Scroll down page until an element with .reveal enters viewport -> Observe 'active' class added and animation play once
Navigate to /index.html -> Enable OS reduce-motion preference -> Scroll to reveal elements -> Observe animations reduced or not played according to accessibility settings

features.name: Animated Social Proof Counters
features.description: Counters that animate from 0 to a data-target value when the stats section enters the viewport and do not re-animate after first play.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Scroll to stats section -> Observe counters animate to their data-target values with easing -> Scroll away and back -> Observe counters do not re-animate
Navigate to /index.html -> Simulate IntersectionObserver not supported or disabled -> Scroll to stats section -> Observe static numbers or no animation and ensure values are readable

features.name: Navigation Menu (Desktop and Mobile)
features.description: Responsive navbar loaded via partial with desktop dropdown and mobile hamburger drawer, includes theme toggle and WhatsApp CTA.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Wait for header partial to load -> Hover over service categories dropdown on desktop -> See dropdown menu items -> Click a nav link -> Navigate to linked route
Navigate to /index.html on narrow viewport -> Click hamburger icon -> Observe mobile menu slides in -> Click a nav link in mobile menu -> Observe navigation to target page
Navigate to /index.html but header partial fetch delayed -> Attempt to click a header CTA immediately -> Observe element not present until DOM injection completes; user must wait

features.name: WhatsApp Country-Aware CTA Routing
features.description: Country-aware WhatsApp deeplinks that switch target number between Colombia (+57) and Spain (+34) based on selected country code in contact forms.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html#contacto -> Change country code dropdown to Spain (+34) -> Observe WhatsApp CTA link update to Spain number in real-time -> Click CTA -> WhatsApp link opens in new tab/wa.me with Spain number
Navigate to /index.html#contacto -> Select unsupported country code or leave default -> Observe buildWhatsAppUrl fall back to configured default number (+57) and CTA updates accordingly

features.name: Blog Post Pages
features.description: Blog listing page and individual article pages with related posts and CTAs linking to the quote calculator or contact widget.
user_flows: Navigate to /blog.html -> Click an article card -> Navigate to the article page (e.g., /blog/organiza-clientes-crm.html) -> Click in-article CTA to /cotizador.html -> Navigate to the calculator
Navigate to /blog.html -> Click "Volver al Blog" on an article page -> Navigate back to /blog.html

features.name: Partial Loading and Known Fetch Timing Limitation
features.description: Header and contact partials are injected via fetch(); tests must account for asynchronous DOM injection before interacting with those elements.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Wait for partials/header.html and partials/contact.html to be fetched and injected -> Interact with header and contact widget elements successfully
Navigate to /index.html -> Immediately attempt to click contact widget or header CTAs before partial injection -> Observe elements absent or not clickable and require a page wait or retry

routes.description: Main landing page. Hero with video, animated counters, service grid, process steps, case studies teaser, testimonials slider, blog preview (fetched), contact section (fetched from partial), cookie consent banner.
3-step interactive quote calculator rendered by JS. Step 1 category selection (or diagnostic quiz), Step 2 service selection with price summary, Step 3 contact form submission to n8n webhook.
Blog listing page. Grid of article cards with category badges and CTA links to blog posts.
Case studies page with client-side filter buttons (Todos, Chatbots, CRM, Web, IT Partner).
How We Work page explaining 4-phase process, tech stack, payment terms, and team.
Static terms of service legal page.
Privacy policy with interactive cookie preferences trigger button.
Reseller/partner program page (noindex). 3 distribution packages, margin calculator concept, WhatsApp CTA.
Press and media kit page with corporate info, stats, brand resource request CTAs.
IT Partner service detail page with Standard ($50/mo) and Evolution ($300/mo) Stripe checkout links.
Private client onboarding page (noindex). WhatsApp support link, service request form to n8n.
Blog article about organizing clients with CRM.
Blog article about why to use a CRM.
Blog article about automating social media.

features.name: Simple Contact Form (Hablemos)
features.description: 3-field contact form loaded via fetch into
user_interactions: Click "Hablemos" tab (active by default)
Fill name field (required)
Fill company field (optional)
Select contact method radio (Email or Teléfono/WhatsApp)
Fill email or select country code + fill phone number
Fill message textarea (required)
Click "Enviar Mensaje" submit button
See success popup after successful submission

features.name: Service Request Form (Ticket)
features.description: Service ticket creation form in second tab of contact widget. Has file attachment support (image/PDF max 50MB). Posts FormData to n8n.
user_interactions: Click "Solicitud de Servicio" tab
Fill requester name (required)
Select contact method and fill email or phone+country
Fill task title (required)
Fill task description (required)
Pick desired start date (required)
Optionally attach file (image or PDF)
Click "Crear Solicitud" submit button
See success popup after submission

features.name: Appointment Scheduling Tabs
features.description: Third tab in contact widget. 3 meeting type cards linking to Google Calendar booking pages in new tab.
user_interactions: Click "Agendar" tab
Click appointment type card (Asesoría Comercial, Capacitación, or Solicitud de Servicio)
Redirected to Google Calendar scheduling link in new tab

features.name: Interactive Quote Calculator
features.description: 3-step JS-rendered wizard. Step 1 category selection grid, Step 2 service cards with optional extras and live price sidebar, Step 3 lead form. Supports URL hash deep-linking to pre-select categories.
user_interactions: Select one or more service categories on Step 1
Click "Continuar" to advance to Step 2
Toggle service cards on/off by clicking them
Toggle optional extras checkboxes per service
Increment/decrement counter extras
View real-time price summary sidebar (one-time + monthly + savings)
Click "Solicitar Cotización" to advance to Step 3
Fill name (required), company, email (required), phone (required), comments
Click "Enviar Cotización" to submit JSON to n8n

features.name: Diagnostic Quiz (inside Calculator)
features.description: 3-question guided quiz triggered by "No sé por dónde empezar" button on Step 1. Auto-selects service categories based on combined answers.
user_interactions: Click "No sé por dónde empezar" button
Answer question 1 (what wastes your time)
Answer question 2 (do you have a website)
Answer question 3 (what is most urgent)
Quiz auto-selects recommended categories and returns to Step 1

features.name: Case Studies Filter
features.description: Client-side category filter on /casos.html using data-category attributes on grid cards.
user_interactions: Click filter button "Todos" to show all cases
Click "Chatbots" to show chatbot cases only
Click "CRM" to show CRM cases only
Click "Web" to show web cases only
Click "IT Partner" to show IT partner cases only

features.name: Cookie Consent Banner (GDPR)
features.description: GDPR-style cookie consent loaded from partial. 3 actions (Accept All, Reject Optional, Configure). Preferences stored in localStorage (cd_cookie_consent). Configurable via preferences panel toggle.
user_interactions: Banner auto-shows after 900ms delay on first visit
Click "Aceptar Todo" to accept all cookies
Click "Rechazar Opcionales" to accept necessary cookies only
Click "Configurar" to open preferences panel
Toggle analytics and marketing checkboxes in panel
Click "Guardar Preferencias" to save custom preferences
Click "Configurar Cookies" in privacy policy or footer to reopen panel

features.name: Dark/Light/Auto Theme Toggle
features.description: Theme switcher in navbar (desktop and mobile). Cycles auto/dark/light. Stored in localStorage (cd-theme). Swaps logo image between light/dark variants.
user_interactions: Click sun/moon toggle button in header
Theme cycles between auto, dark, and light modes
Preference is persisted across page refreshes

features.name: IT Partner Plan Purchase (Stripe)
features.description: Direct Stripe checkout links for Standard ($50/mo) and Evolution ($300/mo) IT Partner plans.
user_interactions: View plan comparison table (Standard vs Evolution)
Click "Activar Estándar" button → Stripe checkout opens in new tab
Click "Activar Evolución" button → Stripe checkout opens in new tab

features.name: Scroll Reveal Animations
features.description: IntersectionObserver-based reveal for .reveal, .reveal-left, .reveal-right, .reveal-scale elements. Adds 'active' class on viewport intersection. Supports data-delay for stagger.
user_interactions: Scroll down any page to trigger reveal animations on elements entering viewport

features.name: Animated Social Proof Counters
features.description: Counter elements animate from 0 to their data-target value with ease-out cubic easing when entering viewport. Prevents re-animation after first play.
user_interactions: Scroll to stats section on homepage to see counters animate (500+ clients, 10+ countries, 200+ hours saved)

features.name: Navigation Menu (Desktop and Mobile)
features.description: Responsive navbar loaded from partials/header.html. Desktop nav with dropdown. Mobile hamburger menu with slide-in drawer. Theme toggle and WhatsApp CTA in header.
user_interactions: Click hamburger icon to toggle mobile menu
Click nav links to navigate between pages
Click "Cotizar Ahora" primary CTA in header
Hover over service categories dropdown in desktop nav

features.name: WhatsApp Country-Aware CTA Routing
features.description: buildWhatsAppUrl() dynamically selects Colombia (+57) or Spain (+34) WhatsApp number based on country code selected in contact forms. CTA links update in real-time.
user_interactions: Change country code dropdown in contact form → WhatsApp link in page CTAs dynamically updates

features.name: Blog Post Pages
features.description: Individual blog article pages with structured content, related post links, and CTA sections. All posts link back to /blog.html and have CTAs linking to /cotizador.html.
user_interactions: Click article card on blog listing page → navigate to article
Click in-article CTA links to cotizador or contact
Click "Volver al Blog" link to return to listing

known_limitations.issue: Contact forms and quote form POST to live n8n webhook — tests with real submissions will hit production
known_limitations.impact: Test form submissions cannot be intercepted; they will create real leads in n8n workflows

known_limitations.issue: Header and contact partial loaded asynchronously via fetch() from relative paths — tests must wait for DOM injection
known_limitations.impact: Navigation and contact form elements may not be immediately available on page load

known_limitations.issue: COTIZADOR_PLAN_A_MEDIDA.html is a dev artifact not linked from any navigation
known_limitations.impact: Cannot be reached through normal user flow; direct URL access only

known_limitations.issue: servicios/bienvenida.html and distribuidores.html are noindex private pages not linked from navigation
known_limitations.impact: Can only be accessed via direct URL
